sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41413" key="e)pitraxh/lios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιτρᾰχήλιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">τράχηλος</etym>) <sense id="n41413.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">on the neck,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κόσμος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
